LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PIUS LEE'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COURT DECLINES THE REQUEST TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE. PARAGRAPH TEN OF THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES DEFENDANTS CAUSED THE DISCLOSURE OF PRIVATE FINANCIAL INFORMATION. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF CHARGES DEFENDANTS WITH MISUSING THEIR CORPORATE POSITION. FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEMURRER, THE ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENT TO OVERCOME THE PROTECTION OF CORPORATIONS CODE SECTIONS 5239 AND 309(C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PIUS LEE'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: PAUL WARTELLE, ESQUIRE (WARTELLE WEAVER & SCHREIBER, 415.693.0504) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JOSEPH M. BREALL, ESQUIRE (BREALL & BREALL, 415.345.0545) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COURT DECLINES THE REQUEST TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE. PARAGRAPH TEN OF THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES DEFENDANTS CAUSED THE DISCLOSURE OF PRIVATE FINANCIAL INFORMATION. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF CHARGES DEFENDANTS WITH MISUSING THEIR CORPORATE POSITION. FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEMURRER, THE ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENT TO OVERCOME THE PROTECTION OF CORPORATIONS CODE SECTIONS 5239 AND 309(C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J.
